overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial urban district under elevated highways, passing a holographic advertisement and garbage piles, and entering the 'RED DIRT' bar with neon-lit interior and checkered floors.

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway through an industrial district with large concrete pillars

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead casting shadows on the street
gray industrial facility with metal pipes and cylindrical tanks
futuristic high-rise buildings visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway in an industrial district. The camera follows the character walking on asphalt past concrete support pillars and industrial buildings. Around 8 seconds, the scene transitions from shadow to bright sunlight as the character emerges from under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with holographic advertisement display

events.description: approaching and passing a large holographic billboard projecting a green-tinted image
bald pedestrian with backpack passes close to camera on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area toward a large holographic display surrounded by garbage piles

notable_agents.action: bald man with tan backpack walking past the camera

entered.detail: large floating holographic display showing green-tinted imagery mounted on a pole
large mound of black garbage bags and debris on the sidewalk
tall palm tree trunk with sparse fronds next to the garbage pile
large rust-red industrial building with corrugated metal walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a sunlit open area featuring a prominent holographic billboard surrounded by garbage piles and a palm tree. The red industrial building dominates the left side. Pedestrians are scattered throughout, and one bald man with a backpack passes close to the camera around the 22-second mark.

events.description: slowing pace as approaching the Red Dirt bar entrance with pedestrians gathered outside

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the Red Dirt bar entrance, passing groups of standing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in pink shirt and white pants standing outside the bar entrance

entered.detail: bright red neon sign reading 'RED DIRT' mounted above the entrance
dark red building front with graffiti and metal security doors
large curved industrial ventilation pipes crossing overhead
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk approaching the Red Dirt bar, identifiable by its bright red neon signage. The area features industrial pipes overhead and graffiti-covered walls. Several pedestrians stand outside the bar entrance as the character slows down and approaches the double doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: dive bar interior with checkered floor and neon lighting

events.description: entering the Red Dirt bar through double metal doors
transition from bright natural sunlight to dim interior illuminated by pink and purple neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking into the bar and moving toward the pool table area at the back

notable_agents.action: patron with red hair standing at the bar counter
two individuals playing pool at the pool table

entered.detail: double metal security doors with mesh windows that open inward
brown and tan checkered tile pattern covering the bar floor
long bar with stools and bottles lined up against the left wall
pink fluorescent tube lights illuminating the bar area
red-felt pool table with players gathered around it
large American flag hanging on the back wall behind the bar

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Red Dirt bar through metal double doors, transitioning from the bright outdoor street to a dimly lit interior with checkered floors and pink neon lighting. Inside, patrons gather at the bar and around a pool table, while an American flag hangs on the back wall. The camera moves through the space toward the pool table area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of an industrial overpass into the vibrant, neon-lit interior of a local bar. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, following a character past concrete pillars and industrial buildings before emerging from the shade into bright, direct sunlight. As the environment opens up, the camera passes a prominent holographic billboard amidst piles of garbage and a lone palm tree, weaving through scattered pedestrians on a sun-drenched street. The scene then shifts toward the Red Dirt bar, moving past graffiti-covered walls and overhead industrial pipes as the character approaches the entrance. Finally, the camera glides through metal double doors, transitioning from the bright outdoor glare to a dimly lit interior characterized by checkered floors, pink neon lighting, and patrons gathered around a pool table.
